titleStmt.title: SII 19.6: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 6. (A.R. No. 224 of 1911.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, NĀGĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers a sale of a quarter (vēli) of land by the mūlaparishat of Tirukkuḍamukkil a dēvadāna in Pāmbūr-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river, to bēhalf of the temple of Tirukkīḻkōṭṭattu-Perumāḷ) for 25 kaḻañju of gold which had been endowed for a perpetual lamp in the temple by a certain Paḍaivaḷḷuvaṉ Kāḍaṉ Āchchaṉ. This land is said to have been presented to the assembly as abhishēka-dakshiṇai (evidently by the king) on the occasion of his coronation. As the land endowed by this Kāḍaṉ Āchchaṉ is referred to in a record of Āditya II from the same place (A.R. No. 225 of 1911., S.I.I. Vol. III, No. 204), the present inscription may be assigned to the same king.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesari
varmmarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭaka
raip pāmpūrnāṭṭu tevatāṉa
n tirukkuṭamūkkil mulapari
ṭaip perumakkaḷom viṟṟuk
kuṭutta nilavilai Āvaṇam
karuḷ kuñcirarilp paṭaiva
ḷḷuvaṟ kāṭaṉ Āccaṉukku
viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāva
tu nāṅkaḷ Abhiṣeka dakṣiṇai pe
ṟṟa tirukkiḻkoṭṭattu perumāḷukku viṟ
ṟa meṟkāviri nilattil Ipperumāḷukku
kkāṭaṉ ṉāccaṉ vaitta tirunontāvi
ḷakku 1 Oṉṟiṉukku Erivatāka vaitta pon
25 Ivvirupattaiṅkaḻañcukkum viṟṟu
kkuṭutta nilam va Ikkāṟ ceykku kiḻpāṟ
kellai kalaṅkaānilai Uttamaāgrattukku
koṇṭu vaitta nilattukku meṟkum
Ipperumāḷ nilattukkey vaṭakku
Ipperumāḷ nilattukkey kiḻa
kku ceriy Ellai varampukku teṟkku
m Ivicaitta perunāṉkellai
yuḷ ḷakappaṭṭa nilam va Ikkāṟ ce
yyālum nicatam 4 Uḻakku neyyāka O
nontāviḷakku cantrātittaval E
vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom kāṭaṉāccaṉu
kku mulaparuṭaip perumakkaḷom paṇiyāl madhyasthaṉ Āyi
rattu muṉṉūṟṟuva ṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 19.6 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
